home.heroSubtitle: Premie platform grosses ek apre akousman fer spesialman pou Moris. An angle, franse ek kreol morisien.
home.featuresTitle: Tou seki to bizin, dan enn sel plas
home.featuresSubtitle: Fini ar bann group WhatsApp, konsey Facebook, ou app internasional zenerik. Vre sipor, fer lokalman.
home.featureTrackerDesc: Swivi semenn par semenn avek konteni spesifik pou Moris, konparezon avek frwi lokal ek rapel bilan.
home.featureDirectoryDesc: Rod zinekolog, klinik ek maternite pre kot ou dan tou distrik.
home.featureEmergencyDesc: Rod maternite pli pre instantaneman. Kan sak segonn konte.
home.featurePPDDesc: Bilan limer PPD, kronolozi rekiperasion, sipor aletman ek swivi letap tibaba.
home.featureForumDesc: Enn lespas modere ek sekirize pou kestion grosses. Enkli enn rezo solidarite pou mama solo.
home.featureDonationsDesc: Donn ek resevwar lartik tibaba. Konek bann Morisien zenere avek mama dan bezoin.
home.featureFoodDesc: Ki manze Morisien ki safe pandan grosses? Dal puri, gato pima, dholl — nou kouver tou.
home.featureRightsDesc: Konn to drwa dapre Workers' Rights Act. 14 semenn konze peye, eksplike simpleman.
home.ctaSubtitle: Zwenn bann milye mama Morisien dan zot parkour grosses.

emergency.disclaimer: An ka irzans, toultan apel 114 (SAMU) avan.
emergency.distanceDisclaimer: Bann distans la bann estimasyon apepre. Aktiv lokalizasyon pou bann distans pli presi.

postpartum.title: Swin apre akousman
postpartum.subtitle: Ou konte, mem apre nesans
postpartum.ppdSubtitle: Baze lor lesel depresion postnatal Edinburgh
postpartum.ppdNormal: To limer paret an bonn sante. Kontinie koumsa, mama!
postpartum.ppdMonitor: Ou kapav pe traverse bann difikilte. Koz ar enn dimounn ou fer konfians.
postpartum.ppdAtRisk: Silvouple konsider koz ar enn profesionel.
postpartum.milestonesSubtitle: Swiv devlopman to tibaba mwa par mwa
postpartum.recoverySubtitle: Parkour gerison to lekor apre nesans
postpartum.breastfeedingSubtitle: Konsey, gid ek konsiltan laktasion lokal
postpartum.disclaimerEPDS: Sa zouti depistaz la baze lor lesel depresion postnatal Edinburgh (EPDS). Li pa enn zouti diagnostik. Silvouple konsilt enn profesionel lasante pou enn evalwasion apropriye.
postpartum.answersPrivate: To bann repons prive ek pa pou partaze. Sa bilan la baze lor lesel depresion postnatal Edinburgh (EPDS).
postpartum.repeatRecommendation: Li rekomande pou refer sa bilan la sak 2 semenn.
postpartum.talkToPartner: Koz ar to partner, enn kamarad ou enn manb lafami
postpartum.speakWithMidwife: Koz ar to saz-fam ou dokter lor to prosenn vizit
postpartum.joinSupportGroup: Zwenn enn group sipor lokal pou bann nouvo mama
postpartum.mentalHealthMatters: To sante mantal konte. Silvouple koz ar enn profesionel lasante.
postpartum.notAlone: Ou pa tousel. Led disponib aster mem.
postpartum.freeConfidential: Gratis, konfidansiel, disponib 24 lor 24, 7 zour lor 7
postpartum.goToNearestHospital: Al dan seksion irzans lopital pli pre
postpartum.milestonesNote: Sak tibaba devlope a so prop ritm. Sa bann letap la zis bann gid zeneral. Si ou ena bann traka, koz ar to pediatr.
postpartum.vaccinesSource: Sours : Minister Lasante ek Byenet, Repiblik Moris. Toultan konfirm kalandriye avek to pediatr.

forum.title: Forum kominote
forum.subtitle: Enn lespas sekirize ek modere pou bann mama Morisien
forum.safeSpaceDesc: Tou post verifie par nou moderater. Ou kapav poste anonymement. Respekte sakenn ek soyez bienveillant.
forum.categoryDescPregnancy: Tou seki konsern ou grossess — kestion, konsey, ek partaz lexperyans.
forum.categoryDescPostpartum: Sipor apre akousman — PPD, breastfeeding, recovery ek plis ankor.
forum.categoryDescSoloMothers: Enn espas solidarite pou mama solo. Resours, konsey ek sipor emosyonel.
forum.categoryDescGeneral: Diskisyon zeneral — gyneko, bilan, ekipman, ek tou seki konsern maternite.

rights.title: To drwa maternite
rights.subtitle: Konn to drwa dapre lalwa Morisien
rights.leaveDesc: 14 semenn konze maternite peye dapre Workers' Rights Act 2019.
rights.protectionDesc: To anplwayer pa kapav met fin to lanplwa pandan grosses ou konze maternite.
rights.breastfeedingDesc: Ou ena drwa a de poz 30 minit par zour pou aletman ziska 6 mwa to zanfan.
rights.medicalDesc: Ou ena drwa pran konze pou bann randevou medikal prenatal.
rights.source: Sours: Workers' Rights Act 2019, Gouvernman Moris
rights.leaveDetail1: 14 semenn konze maternite peye a 100% ou saler de baz.
rights.leaveDetail2: Ou kapav koumans ou konze ziska 6 semenn avan dat akousman previr.
rights.leaveDetail3: Apre akousman, ou ena drwa a minimum 8 semenn konze.
rights.leaveDetail4: Si ou ena bann komplikasyon, ou dokter kapav preskrir enn aret maladi siplemanter ki pa pou dedwi depi ou 14 semenn.
rights.leaveDetail5: Sa drwa la aplikab pou tou travayer, ki li permanent, kontrat, ou part-time.
rights.protectionDetail1: Ou anplwayer PA KAPAV lisansie ou pandan ou grosses ou pandan ou konze maternite.
rights.protectionDetail2: Si ou lisansie pandan sa period la, sa enn lisansieman abisif ki pasib pouswit.
rights.protectionDetail3: Ou anplwayer pa kapav refiz ou enn promosyon akoz ou grosses.
rights.protectionDetail4: Ou kondisyon travay pa kapav sanze negativman (reduir saler, sanz horaire san ou akord).
rights.protectionDetail5: Si sa arive ou, kontakte Ministry of Labour imediatman: 207 2600.
rights.breastfeedingDetail1: 2 poz de 30 minit par zour pou aletman.
rights.breastfeedingDetail2: Sa bann poz la peye — pa kapav dedwir depi ou saler.
rights.breastfeedingDetail3: Drwa la valid ziska ou baba ena 6 mwa.
rights.breastfeedingDetail4: Ou anplwayer bizin fourni enn lespas prive ek prop pou aletman ou tir lait.
rights.breastfeedingDetail5: Sa bann poz la an plis de ou poz dezene normal.
rights.medicalDetail1: Ou ena drwa pou al ou bann randevou prenatal san pert de saler.
rights.medicalDetail2: Ou bizin prezant enn sertifika medikal a ou anplwayer.
rights.medicalDetail3: Sa inklir bann echografi, priz de sang, ek tou bann konsiltasyon prenatal.
rights.medicalDetail4: Ou anplwayer pa kapav refiz ou sa bann randevou la.
rights.medicalDetail5: Konsey: inform ou anplwayer alavans otan ki posib pou bann randevou.
rights.emergencyContact: Si ou drwa pa respekte, kontakte Ministry of Labour
rights.emergencyContactDesc: Konfidansyel ek gratis. Zot kapav ed ou fer valer ou drwa.
rights.faqSubtitle: Bann repons a bann kestion frekant lor drwa maternite dan Moris
rights.faqQuestion1: Mo anplwayer refiz mo donn konze maternite. Ki mo fer?
rights.faqAnswer1: Kontakte Ministry of Labour imediatman lor 207 2600. Sa ilegal ek ou anplwayer risk sanksyon. Ou kapav osi kontakte enn avoka spesialize dan drwa travay. Gard tou bann prev (email, mesaz, etc.).
rights.faqQuestion2: Mo ena enn kontrat CDD (fixed-term). Mo ena drwa konze maternite?
rights.faqAnswer2: Wi! Tou travayer, ki li permanent, kontrat, ou part-time, ena drwa a konze maternite si zot finn travay o mwens 12 mwa konsekitif ar mem anplwayer.
rights.faqQuestion3: Mo kapav travay overtime pandan mo grosses?
rights.faqAnswer3: Ou pa oblize fer overtime pandan ou grosses. Si ou travay oblig ou fer zafer ki danzere pou ou sante ou sante ou baba, ou dokter kapav preskrir enn sertifika pou sanz ou kondisyon travay.
rights.faqQuestion4: Ki pase si mo baba ne premature?
rights.faqAnswer4: Ou konze maternite koumanse depi zour akousman. Ou 14 semenn reste parey. Si ou baba bizin hospitalize, ou kapav diskite ar ou anplwayer pou enn aranzman.
rights.faqQuestion5: Mo papa. Eski ena konze paternite?
rights.faqAnswer5: Wi! Depi 2019, papa ena drwa a 5 zour konze paternite peye. Sa bizin pran dan 5 semenn apre nesans baba.
rights.faqQuestion6: Mo finn fer enn fos koush. Eski mo ena drwa a konze?
rights.faqAnswer6: Wi, ou ena drwa a 14 zour konze peye si ou fer enn fos koush apre semenn 14 de grosses. Si avan semenn 14, ou dokter kapav preskrir enn aret maladi.
rights.ctaDesc: Kontakte Ministry of Labour pou enn konsey konfidansyel ek gratis lor ou sitiasyon spesifik.
